hero.headline: Expert Auto Repair You Can Rely On
hero.subheadline: From routine maintenance to major repairs, our certified mechanics deliver quality workmanship and transparent service. We keep your car running safely and smoothly.

featureSections.title: Full-Service Auto Repair & Maintenance
featureSections.body: We handle everything from oil changes and brake repairs to engine diagnostics and transmission work. Our state-of-the-art equipment and ASE-certified technicians ensure your vehicle gets the care it deserves.
bullets: Oil changes, tire rotations, and fluid checks
featureSections.cardBody: Every technician at East Side Auto Repair is ASE-certified and undergoes continuous training to stay current with the latest automotive technology.

featureSections.title: Honest, Upfront Service
featureSections.body: We believe in clear communication and fair pricing. Before any work begins, we provide a detailed estimate and explain all necessary repairs. No surprises, no hidden fees.
featureSections.cardBody: We treat every car as if it were our own. Our commitment to honesty has earned us a loyal customer base across Dallas.

cta.headline: Ready for Reliable Auto Repair?

servicesPage.intro: At East Side Auto Repair, we offer a full range of automotive services designed to keep your vehicle running at its best. From routine maintenance to complex repairs, our skilled technicians use the latest tools and techniques to deliver quality results every time.

services.title: Oil Change & Fluid Services
services.shortDescription: Keep your engine healthy with regular oil changes and fluid checks.
services.longDescription: Regular oil changes are the most important maintenance for your vehicle. We use premium oils and filters to protect your engine, improve performance, and extend its life. Our fluid services include coolant, brake fluid, transmission fluid, and power steering fluid checks and replacements.
benefits: Extends engine life and improves fuel economy

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We check your current oil level, condition, and all other fluid levels.

process.title: Drain & Replace
process.description: We drain old oil, replace the filter, and fill with the manufacturer-recommended oil.

process.title: Final Check
process.description: We top off all fluids, reset your oil life monitor, and provide a full inspection report.

faqs.question: How often should I get an oil change?
faqs.answer: Most vehicles need an oil change every 5,000 to 7,500 miles, but check your owner's manual for specific recommendations.

faqs.question: What type of oil do you use?
faqs.answer: We use high-quality synthetic and conventional oils that meet or exceed manufacturer specifications.

services.title: Brake Repair & Replacement
services.shortDescription: Expert brake services for safe, confident stopping.
services.longDescription: Your brakes are your vehicle's most critical safety system. Our technicians inspect pads, rotors, calipers, and brake lines to ensure optimal performance. We use quality parts and precision tools to restore your braking system to factory standards.

process.title: Comprehensive Inspection
process.description: We measure pad thickness, rotor condition, and check for leaks or wear.

process.title: Precision Service
process.description: We replace worn components and resurface or replace rotors as needed.

process.title: Road Test
process.description: We test your brakes on the road to ensure proper function and no unusual noises.

faqs.question: How do I know if my brakes need service?
faqs.answer: Common signs include squealing or grinding noises, a soft brake pedal, or longer stopping distances.

faqs.question: How long does a brake job take?
faqs.answer: Most brake repairs are completed within 2-3 hours, depending on the extent of the work.

services.title: Engine Diagnostics & Repair
services.shortDescription: Accurate diagnostics and expert engine repairs to restore performance.
services.longDescription: When your check engine light comes on or your vehicle runs rough, our advanced diagnostic tools pinpoint the issue quickly. From sensor replacements to major engine repairs, we provide thorough solutions that get your car back to peak performance.

process.title: Computer Scan
process.description: We use professional-grade scanners to read trouble codes and identify potential problems.

process.title: System Testing
process.description: We perform additional tests on components like fuel, ignition, and emissions systems.

process.title: Repair & Verify
process.description: After repair, we clear codes and test drive to confirm the issue is resolved.

faqs.question: Why is my check engine light on?
faqs.answer: It could be a minor issue like a loose gas cap or something more serious. We'll diagnose it for you.

faqs.question: Can you fix any engine problem?
faqs.answer: We handle most engine repairs, from sensors to internal components. If a specialist is needed, we'll refer you.

services.title: Transmission Services
services.shortDescription: Keep your transmission shifting smoothly with our expert care.
services.longDescription: Transmission problems can be complex and costly. Our technicians are trained to service both automatic and manual transmissions, including fluid changes, filter replacements, and full rebuilds. Early maintenance can prevent major failures and extend transmission life.
benefits: Fluid flush and filter service available

process.title: Fluid Check
process.description: We inspect fluid level, color, and smell to assess condition.

process.title: Service
process.description: We drain old fluid, replace the filter, and refill with fresh fluid.

process.title: Road Test
process.description: We test drive to ensure smooth shifting and no leaks.

faqs.question: How often should I service my transmission?
faqs.answer: Most manufacturers recommend a transmission fluid change every 30,000 to 60,000 miles.

faqs.question: What are signs of transmission trouble?
faqs.answer: Delayed shifting, slipping gears, unusual noises, or fluid leaks are common indicators.

about.headline: Your Trusted Dallas Auto Repair Shop
about.mission: To provide honest, high-quality auto repair services that keep our customers safe and satisfied. We believe in transparency, integrity, and exceptional workmanship.
story: East Side Auto Repair was founded in 2005 with a simple mission: offer reliable, honest auto repair to the Dallas community. What started as a small two-bay shop has grown into a full-service facility serving thousands of customers. Our team of ASE-certified technicians shares a passion for cars and a commitment to doing the job right the first time.

Over the years, we've earned a reputation for fair pricing and clear communication. We don't believe in upselling unnecessary repairs or cutting corners. Every vehicle that leaves our shop is backed by our warranty and our promise. We're proud to be a local business that treats every customer like a neighbor.

coreValues.title: Honesty
coreValues.description: We never recommend repairs you don't need. Our estimates are transparent and accurate.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: We use top-tier parts and tools, and our work is guaranteed.

coreValues.title: Respect
coreValues.description: We treat your time and budget with respect, completing work on schedule and within estimate.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We support local Dallas events and charities, giving back to the community that supports us.

contact.headline: Get in Touch
contact.subheadline: Ready to schedule your next service? Call or stop by today.
